And he started taking them all out on the boat with them and letting them hang out on the weekend 1020 at a time come with me on the boat Well, they loved it. The only problem is He and his wife got along Like oh, I don't know Bill O'Reilly and the biggest liberal you can think of And they fought like cats and dogs the entire time they were on the boat and they fought Unpleasantly Her more than him, but you know a lot of foul language and throwing stuff and Bringing up what you did to me 16 years ago with so-and-so you bastard that sort of thing And of course, you know glad on a boat for two days without booze So now you've added alcohol to this formula Which is not such a good formula And so he was now You know seen in a pretty Ugly Unpleasant Powerless light it only took a couple boat trips 20 25 people total They all talk to each other Spread like wildfire doctors drop it out left and right whole program was over in six months, and he was back in practice Too familiar Too familiar there's a way to use that boat, but that ain't the way to use that boat Bigger one being friends That's not what they are Even if you would like to be You lose power through friendship you don't gain it The only people in your life that you have less power over than your friends of your family Your family you have almost no power over even the ones you're supporting Well you all got one At least one don't you? Who you're outright supporting Well for fun and giggles go home and try and get them to do something anything Trying to get them to read think it go rich go ahead Have at it It won't happen So you lose power through friendship For variety For a variety of reasons friends for example Understandably feel they ought to get stuff for free We're friends If you're my buddy You know and we hang out together and you use my lawnmower and I stay at your cabin and Etc. Etc. It's just sort of awkward and inappropriate Isn't it to charge that person? For advice when they come to you for advice about their business It's a little awkward to charge him ten thousand bucks to come to a seminar after your buddy And you guys go fishing together four times a year and And your spouses go to the spa together and you're Doesn't fit doesn't fit The other thing is you really can't be a good coach to a friend Because we lie like dogs to our friends We're not willing to offend them We're careful about what we say to them Every friendship you've got you've got a whole little mental list in your head of places. We don't go Things we don't say to one another Topics we don't broach Truths we don't tell If you have any kind of a lengthy friendship you've rewritten history at least six times in it By unstated implicit agreement Or you wouldn't still be friends Well, if you're going to effectively deal with a client or you're going to effectively be a coach to somebody you can't be doing that stuff You got to like pretty much tell them the truth So the friendship is an enormous barrier To sustaining these relationships so you cannot cross this line you can't be you can be friendly You want to be friendly? You cannot really be friends So let's take In my case, let's take Ronald grand Mine I've known each other for I don't know 25 years done business together for 25 years I Genuinely and sincerely like rod I Turned down all social invitations
